---
title: Etoile
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784038425/etoiletobiasbell_vk9in5.png
description: Personnage de Tobias Bell, Etoile
categories: [fanart]
date: 2026-06-01
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784038425/etoiletobiasbell_vk9in5.png)
